summary: Lead accepts M6-CLIENT-ALPHA-SURFACES-001 after independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT and lead integration gates. The implementation adds Alpha scenario-to-victory client surfaces through read-model slices and protocol command DTOs, covering diplomacy, legitimacy, succession, policy/event, encyclopedia, AI/adviser reasons, map candidates, checkpoint save/load, victory/failure status, and forbidden-surface exclusions without storing full WorldState or directly mutating authority state.

tests_run.result: Passed 10 Chromium tests including M6 Alpha flow and viewport overflow checks.
Passed format, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture boundary check.
Passed architecture, sim determinism, root Vitest 39 files / 301 tests, and web 1 file / 4 tests.
QA ACCEPT handoff is valid after schema reconciliation.

decisions: Accept QA ACCEPT and proceed to PR integration.
Keep Alpha client surfaces fixture/read-model driven; live worker query-stream integration remains future work outside this task.
Do not add manual node battle, telemetry, server/account, desktop bridge, arbitrary-code mod UI, release, or commercial decisions.
risks: PR CI must pass before the task can be CLOSED.
Storybook build passes, but M6 state variants are covered primarily through Playwright and fixture URL modes because .storybook/** was outside allowed paths.
requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge on pass, sync main, write CLOSED checkpoint, and continue to the next READY M6 task.
